name: python3-libbde
title: python3-libbde
summary: BitLocker Drive Encryption access library -- Python 3 bindings
description:
BitLocker Drive Encryption access library -- Python 3 bindings
The BDE format is used by Microsoft Windows (Vista and later) to
encrypt data on a storage media volume.
.
This package includes Python 3 bindings.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-libbde because BitLocker Drive Encryption access library -- Python 3 bindings.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-libbde as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-libbde with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-libbde --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
